description: Repository registry for the Long-Context Coding Evaluation Dataset (GSoC 2026, Issue #23316). Anchor repos have tasks extracted. Diversity repos are listed for proposal completeness and will receive tasks in the full GSoC project.

anchor_repos.name: vllm-project/vllm
anchor_repos.why_selected: Massive distributed inference system. Bugs span scheduler, worker, attention backend, and platform layers simultaneously. Real Q1 2026 roadmap items. Requires 50k-90k token context.

anchor_repos.name: google-deepmind/torax
anchor_repos.why_selected: JAX functional programming forces explicit value threading — agents cannot imperatively set attributes. Bugs must be traced through physics model → data structure → output layers. Only scientific computing repo in dataset.

anchor_repos.name: learningequality/kolibri
anchor_repos.why_selected: Only full-stack cross-language repo in dataset. Bugs spanning Django + Morango sync engine + Vue.js frontend require reading Python and JavaScript simultaneously. Used in 200+ countries.

anchor_repos.name: kubeedge/ianvs
anchor_repos.why_selected: Contributor built a full dataset and benchmarking pipeline here as LFX mentee. Deep knowledge of the plugin architecture (scenario→testenv→algorithm→dataset→metrics). Directly relevant to this GSoC project.

anchor_repos.name: langchain-ai/langchain-google
anchor_repos.why_selected: Tasks span two packages simultaneously (genai + vertexai). hallucinated_api is the guaranteed failure mode because SDK class names differ completely between old and new Google AI SDKs. Real user crash with full stack trace.

anchor_repos.name: meshery/meshery
anchor_repos.domain: Cloud native infrastructure management / CNCF project
anchor_repos.why_selected: Only Go+React+GraphQL repo in dataset. Three-language fix required (Go backend, GraphQL schema, React frontend). GraphQL subscription pattern not present in any other task. CNCF project with enterprise production use.

diversity_repos.name: rust-lang/rust
diversity_repos.why_selected: Compiler codebase requires understanding AST, type checker, borrow checker, and code generation simultaneously. Extreme long-context requirement. Only systems/compiler language in the full dataset.

diversity_repos.name: vercel/next.js
diversity_repos.why_selected: Monorepo spanning 300+ packages. Bugs in the App Router require understanding Next.js server, React server components, and the Turbopack Rust bundler simultaneously. Dominant enterprise web framework.

diversity_repos.name: pytorch/pytorch
diversity_repos.why_selected: Autograd engine bugs require reading Python frontend, C++ dispatcher, CUDA kernels, and test suite simultaneously. Industry-standard ML framework with 6M+ lines of code.
